allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Python \(py\) ==="; try { py --version } catch { "no py" }; Write-Output "=== Python \(python\) ==="; try { \(Get-Command python -ErrorAction Stop\).Source } catch { "no python" }; Write-Output "=== Docker ==="; try { docker --version } catch { "no docker" }; Write-Output "=== Go ==="; try { go version } catch { "no go" }; Write-Output "=== .venv ==="; Test-Path "C:\\Users\\julia\\OneDrive\\Escritorio\\UIDE\\TERCER SEMESTRE\\ProyectoIntegrador\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe")

PowerShell($v = "C:\\Users\\julia\\OneDrive\\Escritorio\\UIDE\\TERCER SEMESTRE\\ProyectoIntegrador\\.venv"; Write-Output "=== pyvenv.cfg ==="; Get-Content "$v\\pyvenv.cfg" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "=== venv python version ==="; & "$v\\Scripts\\python.exe" --version 2>&1; Write-Output "=== pip list ==="; & "$v\\Scripts\\python.exe" -m pip list 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 40)
PowerShell(Start-Process -FilePath "wsl.exe" -ArgumentList "--install","--no-distribution" -Verb RunAs -Wait; Write-Output "Lanzado proceso elevado de instalacion de WSL")

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); Write-Output "=== docker en PATH ==="; try { docker --version } catch { "no en PATH" }; Write-Output "=== ruta esperada ==="; Test-Path "C:\\Program Files\\Docker\\Docker\\resources\\bin\\docker.exe"; Write-Output "=== Docker Desktop exe ==="; Test-Path "C:\\Program Files\\Docker\\Docker\\Docker Desktop.exe")

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== API root ==="; \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; Write-Output "`n=== Registro de prueba ==="; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/auth/register" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"username":"prueba_claude","password":"secret123"}' -UseBasicParsing\).Content } catch { $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__; $r=$_.Exception.Response; $sr=New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($r.GetResponseStream\(\)\); $sr.ReadToEnd\(\) })
